name: SuiCredit
one_liner: Undercollateralized lending protocol using on-chain reputation scores built from Sui object ownership history.
sui_advantage: Sui's object model lets each borrower's credit profile be a composable owned object accumulating verifiable history; PTBs allow atomic credit-check-then-borrow in a single transaction.

name: FlashSui
one_liner: Flash loan protocol optimized for Sui's PTB architecture enabling multi-step atomic arbitrage.
sui_advantage: PTBs natively support flash-loan patterns without custom callback infrastructure; a borrow, swap, repay sequence is just one programmable transaction block with guaranteed atomicity.

name: DelegaLend
one_liner: Credit delegation marketplace where depositors can delegate their borrowing power to trusted wallets.
sui_advantage: Delegation rights are first-class Sui objects that can be transferred, revoked, or time-locked; zkLogin lets delegates operate with email-based wallets for accessibility.

name: PeerLend
one_liner: Peer-to-peer lending with custom terms negotiated directly between borrowers and lenders.
sui_advantage: Each loan is an owned Sui object with embedded terms, transferable on secondary markets; PTBs allow offer-match-fund-collateralize in one atomic step.

name: NFTVault Lending
one_liner: Borrow against NFTs with instant appraisals using on-chain collection floor data.
sui_advantage: Sui NFTs are native objects with type-safe metadata; wrapping an NFT inside a loan escrow object preserves provenance and the object model eliminates reentrancy risks during liquidation.

name: LSTLeverage
one_liner: Recursive LST-leveraged lending that loops staked SUI deposits for amplified staking yield.
sui_advantage: PTBs can execute the entire deposit-borrow-stake-redeposit loop in a single transaction block, eliminating multi-tx risk and gas overhead present on other chains.

name: CrossMargin
one_liner: Cross-margin lending account that shares collateral across multiple borrow positions.
sui_advantage: A single shared-object margin account can hold diverse Sui objects as collateral; dynamic fields let new asset types be added without contract upgrades.

name: IsoPool
one_liner: Isolated lending pools per asset pair to contain risk from volatile or new tokens.
sui_advantage: Each pool is an independent Sui shared object with its own risk parameters; the object model naturally isolates state so a bad-debt event in one pool cannot cascade.

name: LendRouter
one_liner: Lending aggregator that routes deposits and borrows to the best rates across Sui lending protocols.
sui_advantage: PTBs can atomically query rates and execute deposits across multiple protocols in one transaction, guaranteeing the user gets the best rate without front-running risk.

name: FixedRate
one_liner: Fixed-rate lending protocol using zero-coupon bond tokens with set maturity dates.
sui_advantage: Bond tokens are typed Sui objects with embedded maturity timestamps; they can be traded on DeepBook's CLOB and settled atomically via PTBs at expiry.

name: TrancheYield
one_liner: Yield tranching protocol splitting lending returns into senior (fixed) and junior (variable) tranches.
sui_advantage: Senior and junior tranche tokens are distinct Sui object types enforced at the Move type system level, preventing accidental mixing; PTBs enable atomic tranche creation and redemption.

name: OnChainFICO
one_liner: On-chain credit scoring system aggregating repayment history, DeFi activity, and staking behavior.
sui_advantage: Credit scores are soulbound Sui objects updated via dynamic fields; zkLogin enables linking Web2 identity attestations without exposing personal data on-chain.

name: LPBorrow
one_liner: Borrow against LP positions without breaking the liquidity pair, earning yield while leveraging.
sui_advantage: LP position objects can be wrapped inside a collateral escrow object while the underlying position continues accruing fees; Sui's object ownership makes this custody model safe and auditable.

name: SocialRecoveryLend
one_liner: Lending protocol with social-recovery-based account abstraction to prevent permanent loss of collateral.
sui_advantage: Sui's multisig and zkLogin allow guardian-based recovery natively; sponsored transactions let guardians execute recovery without holding SUI for gas.

name: MicroLend
one_liner: Micro-lending protocol for sub-$50 loans targeting emerging market users via mobile wallets.
sui_advantage: Sui's sub-cent transaction fees make micro-loans economically viable; zkLogin enables onboarding with just a Google account and sponsored transactions cover gas for first-time borrowers.

name: AutoRange
one_liner: Concentrated liquidity AMM with automatic range rebalancing based on volatility signals.
sui_advantage: PTBs allow atomic withdraw-rebalance-redeposit across tick ranges in a single transaction; Sui's low latency ensures rebalancing happens before significant IL accumulates.

name: TWAMM Sui
one_liner: Time-weighted AMM that executes large orders gradually over blocks to minimize price impact.
sui_advantage: Sui's sub-second finality means TWAMM intervals can be extremely granular; the object model stores each TWAMM order as an owned object the user can cancel or modify anytime.

name: OmniPool
one_liner: Multi-asset single-sided liquidity pool allowing any token to trade against any other in one pool.
sui_advantage: Sui's dynamic fields allow a single shared pool object to hold arbitrary token types without redeployment; PTBs route multi-hop swaps through the pool atomically.

name: StableSwapSui
one_liner: Curve-style stable swap pool optimized for correlated asset pairs on Sui.
sui_advantage: Sui's parallel execution of independent pool objects means stable swap pools do not contend with volatile-pair pools; PTBs allow stablecoin meta-swaps across multiple pools atomically.

name: VelocityDEX
one_liner: ve(3,3) DEX with vote-escrowed governance tokens directing emissions to liquidity pools.
sui_advantage: Vote-escrow positions are transferable Sui objects with time-lock metadata enforced by Move; epoch-based gauge voting aligns with Sui's native epoch system.

name: IntentSwap
one_liner: Intent-based trading protocol where users sign desired outcomes and solvers compete to fill them.
sui_advantage: PTBs are a natural fit for intent execution: solvers compose multi-step fulfillment logic into a single programmable transaction; sponsored transactions let solvers pay gas on behalf of users.

name: RFQSui
one_liner: Request-for-quote protocol connecting institutional traders with professional market makers.
sui_advantage: DeepBook's on-chain CLOB provides transparent price discovery for RFQ benchmarking; PTBs allow atomic quote-accept-settle in one transaction eliminating counterparty risk.

name: ShieldSwap
one_liner: MEV-protected swap router using commit-reveal schemes and private mempools.
sui_advantage: Sui's DAG-based consensus with per-object transaction ordering reduces MEV surface; PTBs make sandwich attacks harder because multi-step swaps execute atomically within one block.

name: RouteX
one_liner: Cross-pool routing optimizer that splits orders across all Sui DEXs for best execution.
sui_advantage: PTBs can split a single swap across Cetus, DeepBook, and Turbos in one atomic transaction; Sui's parallel execution means split routes do not serialize on each other.

name: LaunchPool
one_liner: Liquidity bootstrapping pool for fair token launches with descending price curves.
sui_advantage: The LBP is a time-locked Sui shared object with weight parameters stored as dynamic fields that update each epoch; PTBs prevent multi-block manipulation by atomic participation.

name: DynaFee
one_liner: AMM with dynamic swap fees that adjust in real-time based on volatility and pool utilization.
sui_advantage: Sui's sub-second finality allows fee parameters to update with high frequency; oracle price feeds stored as Sui objects provide low-latency volatility data for fee calculation.

name: PredictAMM
one_liner: Prediction market AMM using logarithmic market scoring rule for event outcome trading.
sui_advantage: Each prediction market is an independent Sui object enabling parallel resolution; outcome tokens are typed objects that the Move compiler verifies sum to 100% at creation.

name: NFTSwap
one_liner: Sudoswap-style NFT AMM with bonding curves for instant NFT buys and sells.
sui_advantage: Sui NFTs are first-class objects that move directly into pool custody without approval patterns; PTBs allow buy-NFT-and-list-on-marketplace in one atomic step.

name: OptionsAMM
one_liner: Automated market maker specifically designed for pricing and trading on-chain options.
sui_advantage: Option contracts are Sui objects with typed strike/expiry metadata enforced by Move; PTBs allow atomic exercise-and-swap of option payoffs.

name: PerpSwap
one_liner: vAMM-based perpetual swap protocol with virtual liquidity and funding rate mechanisms.
sui_advantage: Sui's high throughput supports frequent funding rate recalculations; each position is an owned object users can transfer or use as collateral elsewhere via PTBs.

name: PowerPerps
one_liner: Power perpetual contracts (price-squared exposure) for convex payoffs without options expiry.
sui_advantage: Sui's sub-second finality enables tight funding rate intervals reducing basis risk; position objects with dynamic fields track real-time PnL without off-chain indexing.

name: EverlastingOptions
one_liner: Perpetual options protocol that never expires, using funding payments to maintain fair value.
sui_advantage: Option position objects on Sui carry embedded Greeks and funding state as dynamic fields; PTBs allow atomic roll-and-hedge strategies combining options with spot.

name: StructuredSui
one_liner: Structured product vaults offering principal-protected notes and barrier options to retail users.
sui_advantage: Vault shares are Sui objects with typed maturity and payoff rules enforced by Move; PTBs compose option purchases with deposit actions atomically at vault creation.

name: ExoticaSui
one_liner: Exotic options marketplace offering lookback, Asian, and knock-in/knock-out options.
sui_advantage: Sui's on-chain price history stored as versioned objects provides verifiable lookback data; Move's type system prevents invalid option parameter combinations at compile time.

name: VolToken
one_liner: Tokenized volatility index that lets users go long or short on Sui ecosystem implied volatility.
sui_advantage: Volatility index state is a shared Sui object updated via oracle feeds; token rebalancing executes through PTBs atomically so users never hold stale exposure.

name: LeveragedTokensSui
one_liner: 2x and 3x leveraged tokens with automatic daily rebalancing for simplified leveraged exposure.
sui_advantage: PTBs execute the entire rebalance (redeem-swap-remint) atomically so token value never drifts mid-rebalance; Sui's parallel execution handles mass rebalancing at scale.

name: SynthX
one_liner: Synthetic asset protocol minting tokenized exposure to stocks, commodities, and forex on Sui.
sui_advantage: Each synthetic asset is a distinct Move type preventing cross-contamination; Sui's object model makes synthetic position accounting transparent and auditable on-chain.

name: ProphecySui
one_liner: Prediction market platform for crypto events, governance outcomes, and real-world events.
sui_advantage: Each market is an independent Sui object so thousands of markets run in parallel without contention; zkLogin onboards bettors with just a social login and sponsored transactions cover gas.

name: SportsBetSui
one_liner: Decentralized sports betting with peer-to-peer wager matching and oracle-based settlement.
sui_advantage: Wagers are owned Sui objects that can be traded before settlement; zkLogin and sponsored transactions make the UX feel like a Web2 sportsbook for mainstream users.

name: BinaryOpt
one_liner: Binary options protocol with fixed-payout yes/no contracts on price movements.
sui_advantage: Binary option tokens are Sui objects that resolve to exactly 1 or 0 units; the Move type system enforces payout conservation and PTBs settle all positions in one transaction.

name: ParaShield
one_liner: Parametric insurance derivatives that pay out automatically based on oracle-reported trigger events.
sui_advantage: Insurance contracts are Sui objects with trigger conditions stored as dynamic fields; oracle data flows directly into Move-based trigger evaluation with no off-chain intermediary.

name: WeatherSwap
one_liner: Weather derivative contracts allowing farmers and businesses to hedge temperature and rainfall risk.
sui_advantage: Sui's object model stores weather contract parameters immutably; PTBs enable atomic settlement when oracle-reported weather data crosses thresholds, with payouts in stablecoins.

name: CommoditySynth
one_liner: Synthetic commodity tokens tracking gold, oil, and agricultural commodities without physical custody.
sui_advantage: Each commodity synthetic is a distinct Move type with built-in oracle price validation; Sui's low fees make sub-$10 commodity positions economically viable for retail.

name: IndexSui
one_liner: Tokenized index tracking the top Sui ecosystem tokens with automatic quarterly rebalancing.
sui_advantage: PTBs execute multi-token rebalancing (sell-buy across 10+ tokens) in a single atomic transaction; the index token is a Sui object backed by verifiable on-chain reserves.

name: VarianceVault
one_liner: Variance swap protocol allowing users to trade realized vs. implied volatility of any Sui asset.
sui_advantage: Sui's high-frequency block production provides granular price sampling for realized variance calculation; swap position objects carry full variance accrual history as dynamic fields.

name: YieldPilot
one_liner: Yield aggregator that auto-routes deposits to the highest-yielding Sui DeFi protocol.
sui_advantage: PTBs allow atomic reallocation across Suilend, Navi, and Scallop in one transaction with no intermediate exposure; Sui's parallel execution handles thousands of vault rebalances simultaneously.

name: AutoComp
one_liner: Auto-compounding vaults that harvest and reinvest yields with optimal frequency.
sui_advantage: PTBs batch claim-swap-redeposit into one transaction reducing gas waste; Sui's low fees make frequent compounding profitable even for small positions.

name: DeltaZero
one_liner: Delta-neutral yield strategy vaults that earn yield while hedging directional price exposure.
sui_advantage: PTBs execute the entire hedge setup (deposit LP + open short) atomically; position rebalancing on Sui's sub-second finality minimizes delta drift between rebalances.

name: LeverageFarm
one_liner: Leveraged yield farming protocol that borrows to amplify LP returns up to 5x.
sui_advantage: PTBs compose borrow-from-lending + add-to-LP in one atomic step; Sui's object model makes each leveraged position an owned object with clear liquidation parameters.

name: LPOptimizer
one_liner: LP position optimizer that automatically adjusts concentrated liquidity ranges for maximum fee capture.
sui_advantage: PTBs allow atomic range adjustment (withdraw-from-old-range, deposit-to-new-range) with zero gap in fee earning; Sui's object model tracks each LP position's full history.

name: PointsMarket
one_liner: Marketplace for trading pre-TGE points and airdrop allocations from Sui ecosystem protocols.
sui_advantage: Points are Sui objects with provenance tracking; PTBs allow atomic points-for-stablecoin swaps with escrow so neither party can rug; zkLogin enables anonymous participation.

name: DropFarmer
one_liner: Automated airdrop farming tool that optimizes protocol interactions to maximize eligibility.
sui_advantage: PTBs can batch dozens of qualifying protocol interactions into a single transaction; sponsored transactions let the tool operate wallets that hold zero SUI for gas.

name: TrancheFi
one_liner: Yield tranching protocol splitting DeFi yields into fixed and variable risk tiers.
sui_advantage: Tranche tokens are distinct Move types preventing accidental mixing at the compiler level; PTBs enable atomic entry into a tranche with underlying deposit in one step.

name: FixedYieldSui
one_liner: Fixed yield protocol tokenizing future yield into tradeable principal and yield tokens.
sui_advantage: Principal tokens (PT) and yield tokens (YT) are separate Sui object types with expiry metadata; DeepBook provides CLOB trading for PT/YT enabling yield curve discovery.

name: LiquidStakeSui
one_liner: Next-gen liquid staking with validator diversification and instant unstaking via liquidity pools.
sui_advantage: Sui's native staking system exposes validator objects that the protocol wraps; LST tokens are Sui objects composable with all DeFi protocols via PTBs.

name: ReStakeSui
one_liner: Restaking protocol allowing staked SUI to secure additional networks and earn extra yield.
sui_advantage: Sui's object model allows staking receipts to be wrapped inside restaking contracts while preserving the underlying validator relationship; slashing conditions are enforced in Move.

name: YieldToken
one_liner: Yield tokenization protocol that lets users sell future yield for immediate liquidity.
sui_advantage: Future yield claims are Sui objects with typed time-bounds that Move enforces at runtime; PTBs enable atomic yield-stripping from any DeFi position.

name: RealYield Dashboard
one_liner: Real yield tracking dashboard that separates token emissions from organic protocol revenue.
sui_advantage: Sui's transparent object model makes protocol revenue flows fully traceable on-chain; the dashboard reads shared objects directly for real-time APR that reflects actual fees, not inflated emissions.

name: YieldCompare
one_liner: Cross-protocol yield comparison tool with risk-adjusted scoring and one-click deposits.
sui_advantage: PTBs enable one-click reallocation from one protocol to another atomically; Sui's RPC allows querying all lending protocol shared objects in parallel for real-time rate comparisons.

name: DynamicAllocator
one_liner: AI-driven dynamic yield allocator that rebalances across Sui DeFi based on risk-return optimization.
sui_advantage: PTBs allow multi-protocol rebalancing (withdraw from 3 protocols, deposit to 2 others) in a single atomic transaction; Sui's low latency ensures allocation changes execute before yield opportunities close.

name: SuiNeoBank
one_liner: Regional neobank for Southeast Asia offering stablecoin savings, transfers, and bill payments.
sui_advantage: zkLogin enables sign-up with Google/Apple ID eliminating seed phrase friction; sponsored transactions let users transact without holding SUI; sub-cent fees make micro-transactions viable.

name: RemitSui
one_liner: Cross-border remittance app using stablecoins with on/off ramps in emerging markets.
sui_advantage: Sui's sub-second finality means recipients see funds instantly; zkLogin with phone-based auth makes the app accessible to unbanked users; sponsored transactions cover gas for senders.

name: PayGateSui
one_liner: Merchant payment gateway accepting stablecoins on Sui with instant settlement and fiat conversion.
sui_advantage: Sui's 400ms finality provides merchant-grade settlement speed; PTBs allow payment-split-to-multiple-parties (merchant + platform fee) atomically; zkLogin provides customer-friendly checkout.

name: SubSui
one_liner: On-chain subscription billing protocol for SaaS and content services with automatic token streaming.
sui_advantage: Subscription objects on Sui carry terms, renewal dates, and payment streams as dynamic fields; PTBs allow batch-process-all-renewals in one transaction for service providers.

name: PayrollSui
one_liner: On-chain payroll system with stablecoin streaming, tax withholding, and multi-sig treasury approval.
sui_advantage: PTBs can pay 100+ employees in a single transaction with individual amounts; Sui's native multisig provides treasury governance; zkLogin lets employees receive pay to email-linked wallets.

name: InvoiceFactor
one_liner: Invoice factoring protocol where businesses sell receivables at a discount for immediate liquidity.
sui_advantage: Invoices are Sui objects with embedded payment terms and debtor attestations; PTBs allow atomic purchase-of-invoice with instant stablecoin settlement to the seller.

name: SavingSui
one_liner: Stablecoin savings account with tiered interest rates and no-lockup withdrawals.
sui_advantage: Savings positions are owned Sui objects users fully control; yield is generated from lending protocol integration via PTBs; zkLogin makes opening an account as easy as signing in with Google.

name: ForexSui
one_liner: Decentralized FX trading platform for stablecoin pairs across major fiat currencies.
sui_advantage: DeepBook's CLOB provides professional-grade FX order matching; PTBs allow multi-leg FX trades (e.g., USD to EUR to JPY) atomically; Sui's speed matches TradFi FX expectations.

name: B2BPay
one_liner: Cross-border B2B payment rail with stablecoin settlement and compliance-embedded smart contracts.
sui_advantage: Payment objects carry embedded compliance metadata as dynamic fields; PTBs allow multi-party settlement (buyer, seller, escrow agent) in one atomic transaction; Sui's finality speed matches SWIFT expectations.

name: MicroPay
one_liner: Micropayment protocol for pay-per-article, pay-per-API-call, and IoT machine-to-machine payments.
sui_advantage: Sui's sub-cent gas fees make $0.001 payments economically viable; sponsored transactions let platforms cover user gas; PTBs batch hundreds of micropayments into one transaction.

name: PropTokens
one_liner: Real estate fractionalization platform turning property ownership into tradeable Sui tokens.
sui_advantage: Property shares are Sui objects with embedded legal metadata and transfer restrictions enforced by Move's type system; PTBs allow atomic buy-shares-and-receive-rental-yield.

name: CarbonSui
one_liner: Carbon credit trading marketplace with verified offset tokens and retirement tracking.
sui_advantage: Carbon credits are Sui objects with immutable provenance tracking; once retired, the object is frozen on-chain providing permanent proof; PTBs allow buy-and-retire in one step.

name: CommodityVault
one_liner: Tokenized commodity protocol backed by warehouse receipts for gold, silver, and agricultural goods.
sui_advantage: Commodity tokens are typed Sui objects linked to verified custodian attestations stored as dynamic fields; the object model provides full chain-of-custody auditability.

name: InvoiceToken
one_liner: Invoice tokenization marketplace where investors buy discounted receivables from verified businesses.
sui_advantage: Tokenized invoices are Sui objects with typed payment terms and debtor data; zkLogin enables businesses to onboard with email; PTBs allow atomic invoice-auction-and-settlement.

name: RoyaltySui
one_liner: Music royalty token platform allowing fans to invest in artist revenue streams.
sui_advantage: Royalty tokens are Sui objects with embedded revenue-sharing logic; streaming income distributes via PTBs that split payments to all token holders in one transaction.

name: ArtShares
one_liner: Fine art fractionalization protocol allowing fractional ownership of high-value artworks.
sui_advantage: Art fraction tokens reference a parent NFT object representing the artwork; Sui's object ownership model ensures custody is transparent and fractions are type-safe.

name: PrivateCredit
one_liner: On-chain private credit protocol connecting institutional lenders with verified borrowers.
sui_advantage: Credit agreements are Sui objects with embedded covenants enforced by Move; zkLogin enables institutional KYC-linked wallets; PTBs automate drawdown-and-collateral-lock atomically.

name: RevShare
one_liner: Revenue share token protocol allowing startups to raise capital by tokenizing future revenue.
sui_advantage: Revenue share agreements are Sui objects with automated distribution logic; PTBs can split incoming revenue to all token holders proportionally in one transaction; Sui's low fees make frequent micro-distributions viable.

name: EquipFinance
one_liner: Equipment financing protocol where machinery and vehicles serve as tokenized collateral for loans.
sui_advantage: Equipment NFTs carry maintenance records, valuation history, and lien status as dynamic fields on Sui objects; PTBs automate collateral-lock-and-disburse atomically.

name: AgriToken
one_liner: Agricultural commodity tokens backed by verified crop futures and warehouse receipts.
sui_advantage: Crop tokens are Sui objects with typed harvest-date and grade metadata; Sui's object versioning tracks commodity status through the supply chain from field to warehouse.

name: ContractGuard
one_liner: Smart contract exploit insurance covering losses from hacks and vulnerabilities in Sui protocols.
sui_advantage: Policy objects on Sui carry coverage terms, premium schedules, and claim status as dynamic fields; Move's formal verification capabilities reduce insured protocol risk.

name: PegShield
one_liner: Stablecoin depeg insurance that pays out automatically when a stablecoin drops below its peg threshold.
sui_advantage: Insurance contracts are Sui objects with oracle-linked trigger conditions; PTBs enable atomic claim-and-payout when Pyth price feeds confirm depeg; no manual claims process needed.

name: OracleShield
one_liner: Oracle failure insurance protecting DeFi positions from losses caused by price feed manipulation or downtime.
sui_advantage: Policy objects monitor oracle freshness by comparing Sui object timestamps; automatic payouts trigger via PTBs when oracle staleness exceeds defined thresholds.

name: BridgeGuard
one_liner: Bridge hack insurance covering losses from cross-chain bridge exploits affecting Sui-bridged assets.
sui_advantage: Insurance pool is a Sui shared object with transparent reserves; claim adjudication uses Sui's native event system to verify bridge failure; PTBs process batch claim payouts atomically.

name: CropSure
one_liner: Parametric crop insurance using weather oracle data with automatic payouts to farmers.
sui_advantage: Insurance policies are Sui objects with geo-coordinates and trigger thresholds; Pyth weather feeds flow into Move-based evaluation logic; zkLogin onboards farmers with just a phone number.

name: FlightSure
one_liner: Flight delay insurance with automatic payouts triggered by flight status oracle data.
sui_advantage: Policy objects carry flight number and departure time as typed fields; PTBs auto-settle claims when oracle reports delay exceeding the threshold; zkLogin makes purchasing a policy as easy as email sign-in.

name: HealthMicro
one_liner: Health micro-insurance pools for emerging markets with stablecoin premiums and instant claim payouts.
sui_advantage: Insurance pools are Sui shared objects with transparent reserves visible to all members; zkLogin and sponsored transactions enable participation from unbanked populations; sub-cent fees make micro-premiums viable.

name: MutualSui
one_liner: Peer-to-peer insurance pools where members share risk and split premiums within trusted groups.
sui_advantage: Each insurance pool is a Sui shared object with member list and claim voting stored as dynamic fields; PTBs allow atomic premium-collection-and-payout across all pool members.

name: ReSui
one_liner: Reinsurance protocol where institutional capital backstops primary insurance pool risks.
sui_advantage: Reinsurance tranches are typed Sui objects with programmatic waterfall payment logic in Move; PTBs cascade payouts from primary pools to reinsurers atomically.

name: InsureAgg
one_liner: Insurance aggregator comparing coverage and rates across Sui insurance protocols with one-click purchase.
sui_advantage: PTBs allow comparing and purchasing coverage from multiple insurance protocols in one atomic transaction; the aggregator queries all insurance shared objects for real-time rate comparison.

name: SocialTrade
one_liner: Social trading platform where users follow and auto-replicate top traders' strategies.
sui_advantage: Trader portfolios are transparent Sui objects anyone can read on-chain; PTBs replicate a leader's trade atomically into all follower accounts in one transaction; zkLogin enables social-media-linked profiles.

name: CopySui
one_liner: One-click copy trading connecting novice traders with verified profitable wallets.
sui_advantage: Copy-trade subscriptions are Sui objects with fee-sharing logic; PTBs mirror the leader's DeepBook order placement into follower accounts atomically with no timing lag.

name: TradeArena
one_liner: On-chain trading competitions with prize pools, leaderboards, and verifiable PnL tracking.
sui_advantage: Competition entries are Sui objects with isolated margin accounts; all trades execute on DeepBook's verifiable CLOB; leaderboard state is a shared object updated atomically via PTBs.

name: RebalanceSui
one_liner: Automated portfolio rebalancer maintaining target allocations across Sui tokens.
sui_advantage: PTBs execute multi-token rebalancing (sell overweight, buy underweight across 10+ assets) in a single atomic transaction; portfolio objects track target weights as dynamic fields.

name: DCA Bot
one_liner: Dollar-cost-averaging bot executing scheduled recurring buys on Sui DEXs.
sui_advantage: DCA orders are Sui objects with schedule parameters; keepers trigger execution via PTBs that swap the exact scheduled amount; sponsored transactions let the bot operate user wallets gaslessly.

name: GridBot
one_liner: Grid trading bot placing layered buy and sell orders across price ranges on DeepBook.
sui_advantage: DeepBook's native CLOB supports limit orders at precise price points; PTBs place the entire grid (20+ orders) in one transaction; Sui's low fees make dense grids economically viable.

name: ArbSui
one_liner: Arbitrage bot exploiting price discrepancies between Sui DEXs with atomic execution.
sui_advantage: PTBs guarantee atomic buy-on-cetus-sell-on-deepbook with zero execution risk; if any leg fails the entire transaction reverts; Sui's sub-second finality minimizes arb window closure.

name: MMVault
one_liner: Market making vault where LPs deposit funds and professional strategies provide DeepBook liquidity.
sui_advantage: Vault deposits and withdrawals are atomic via PTBs; the strategy manages DeepBook limit orders as owned objects; Sui's throughput supports the high order frequency market making requires.

name: OTCSui
one_liner: Decentralized OTC desk for large block trades with escrow-based settlement.
sui_advantage: Escrow is a native pattern in Sui's object model; PTBs allow atomic escrow-lock-and-release ensuring neither party can rug; zkLogin enables institutional counterparties to trade with email-based identity.

name: DarkPoolSui
one_liner: Dark pool protocol for large orders with hidden order books and private execution.
sui_advantage: Sui's object model allows encrypted order objects that only reveal contents upon matching; PTBs settle matched orders atomically; zkLogin provides pseudonymous but verifiable trader identity for compliance.
